meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Solving Deployment Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Learn how to configure Claude Code skills with Antigravity to automate your shipping process and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure usually stems from misconfigured environment variables or broken CI/CD pipelines. By leveraging Claude Code's custom skill architecture, you can automate infrastructure-as-code tasks, execute robust build checks, and push directly to production. This workflow eliminates manual intervention, reduces human error, and ensures your production environment matches your local development state.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is waiting for the demo, but the deployment pipeline is throwing cryptic errors. You've spent hours debugging environment variables and dependency conflicts while the 'ship' button feels light-years away. For a freelancer, every minute spent fighting infrastructure is profit leaking out of your business.

This isn't just about fixing a bug; it's about reclaiming your authority as a builder. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a high-velocity deployment engine. We are moving beyond basic coding—we are building an automated bridge between your local logic and the production cloud.

steps.title: Environment Audit
steps.description: Before deploying, ensure your local environment variables are synced. Use Antigravity to verify your .env structure matches the production requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my current directory for missing .env keys against a standard production template. Highlight discrepancies and suggest a fix.

steps.title: Skill Registration
steps.description: Register your deployment script as a custom skill within Claude Code so it can trigger your CI/CD pipeline autonomously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Claude Code skill definition file (skills.yaml) that wraps my deploy.sh script with error handling and logging.

steps.title: Dependency Validation
steps.description: Ensure your production build won't fail due to version drift. Run a validation check against your package-lock.json.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my package.json and lockfile for potential deployment conflicts. Provide a summary of breaking changes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude-code run 'npm audit && npm run build'

steps.title: Automated Infrastructure Provisioning
steps.description: Use Claude Code to execute infrastructure provisioning scripts, ensuring your cloud resources are ready before the code hits the server.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that validates AWS/Vercel connectivity and prepares the deployment target.

steps.title: Execution and Verification
steps.description: Trigger the final deployment and run a post-deployment health check to ensure the site is live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a post-deploy health check script that verifies endpoint status codes and latency.

pro_tips: Always use a 'dry-run' skill flag in your Claude Code config to simulate deployments without burning cloud credits.
Map your deployment logs directly to a Slack webhook using a custom Claude Skill for instant notification.
Inject your environment variables at runtime through Claude Code's secure vault rather than hardcoding in shell scripts.
Use Antigravity to generate 'rollback' skills that automatically revert to the previous container tag on failure.
Keep your skill definitions in a hidden .claude/ directory at the root of every project to make them portable across client repos.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Deployment: https://12factor.net
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is successful, start building a library of reusable Claude Skills for different cloud providers to cut your setup time to near zero.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the terminal and start shipping at scale. Our community provides the templates and high-level strategy you need to dominate your freelance projects. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
